subcodes.first_line: I am well pleased with you all...Ye have rendered many services, and been very assiduous in your labors
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از جمیع شماها راضی و خوشنودم زیرا خدمت کردید و زحمت کشیدید هر صبح آمدید و هر شام
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @The Holy Spirit
